claim: YOLO demand evidence schema, prompts, readiness contract, and tests all distinguish project, external, user, and unknown evidence scopes.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA_DEFINITION defines evidence schema with required scope field
evidence.why: Core schema definition that validates evidence structure and scope requirements.

evidence.summary: Schema docstring states: scope is project | external | user | unknown; project facts require project-scoped evidence
evidence.why: Schema documentation explicitly lists the four valid scope values and project evidence requirement.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES Set defines the four valid scope values: project, external, user, unknown
evidence.why: Runtime validation of allowed scope values.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() classifies evidence into project/external/user/unknown based on source and path
evidence.why: Implementation of scope classification logic with detailed rules for each scope type.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasDeclaredScope() validates scope is in VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES Set
evidence.why: Validation function that ensures evidence records declare a valid scope.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues() generates EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker when scope missing/invalid
evidence.why: Enforcement mechanism that blocks PRD readiness when evidence lacks proper scope declaration.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() enforces project evidence must have repo-relative path or file locator
evidence.why: Validation that project-scoped evidence includes concrete file paths, not just scope declarations.

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceAgentPrompt() instructions mandate scope declaration and project path requirements
evidence.why: Agent prompt explicitly instructs evidence agents to declare scope and provide project locators.

evidence.summary: Prompt hard rule: Every evidence record must include scope: project, external, user, or unknown
evidence.why: Explicit agent instruction that scope is mandatory for all evidence records.

evidence.summary: Prompt hard rule: Project facts require project-scoped evidence from code, tests, docs, config, logs, or artifacts, with a repo-relative path or file locator
evidence.why: Explicit agent instruction that project facts require both project scope and file path.

evidence.summary: Required JSON shape documents evidence record structure with scope field and four valid values
evidence.why: Agent output schema defines expected evidence record format.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors() validates evidence scope and returns specific error messages
evidence.why: Runtime validation that checks each evidence record has a valid scope.

evidence.summary: external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts test
evidence.why: Test verifies external evidence is rejected for existing-project claims.

evidence.summary: project evidence requires a concrete project locator test
evidence.why: Test verifies project evidence without file path is rejected.

evidence.summary: external URLs cannot be relabeled as project evidence test
evidence.why: Test verifies URLs marked as project scope are rejected.

evidence.summary: evidence records must declare valid scope explicitly test
evidence.why: Test verifies evidence without scope declaration is blocked.

evidence.summary: cross-check PRD readiness requires every evidence agent result test
evidence.why: Test verifies all three agent roles (explorer, cross-checker, verifier) must complete.

evidence.summary: agent evidence without explicit scope is blocked during normalization test
evidence.why: Test verifies dispatch runtime rejects evidence without scope.

risks: If evidence scope validation is bypassed or schema changes, external research could be treated as project facts

result.notes: All four components (schema, prompts, readiness contract, tests) explicitly distinguish and validate evidence scopes: project, external, user, unknown. Schema defines VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES Set. Agent prompts mandate scope declaration. Readiness contract enforces project evidence requires file paths. Tests cover all scope validation cases.
